---
title: "PhD Student"
---

## Welcome

I am a PhD student, and this website is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/).

This site is a simple academic homepage where you can share your work, background, and ways to get in touch.

## Overview

- Research: current topics, methods, and collaborations
- Publications: papers, preprints, and conference work
- CV: education, awards, teaching, and service
- Contact: email and professional links

## About Me

Write a short introduction here. A good starting point is your department, university, research area, and one or two sentences about your current work.
